data.name: 魔王軍團肉便器
data.detailed_description:
男主在無聊的鄉下小鎮中虛度光陰，但這樣的生活因為恐怖的魔王軍的襲擊而被打破。
男主被魔王軍司令官，一個有著挑釁男性般的色情身體的女惡魔俘虜。被迫要帶路去找『傳說的盜賊』的秘寶隱藏的洞窟。
但是達成任務之後，卻因為失去利用價值而差點被處分，還好在千鈞一髮之際男主掉入洞窟的陷阱之中墜落到了最深處。在那裡等著你的是寄宿著『傳說的盜賊』的力量的裝備。出其不意的俘虜了魔王軍司令官，用自己天生精力絕倫的巨根不斷的侵犯，把她變成了忠實的飛機杯。

獸人、龍娘、巨魔、死神、暗精靈，還有眼裡容不下盜賊之輩的清廉女騎士。
面對接連不斷襲擊過來的強大而美麗的極品雌性們，用盜賊作弊能力全部反殺！堂堂正正什麼的不用不用，用詐欺拐騙讓她們墮落為飛機杯！
不知不覺間，開始被稱為對抗魔王軍的偉大義賊的男主，被只對自己效忠並且主動獻媚的飛機杯們所侍奉，過著極上的幻想風後宮生活。
世界上的財寶、美女，全都是成為大盜賊的你的囊中之物。
而下一個獵物就是—特別的工口、美麗又強大的女魔王！


  • 官方漢化版
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。
  • 幾小時的內容。
  • 所有人妻帶有日文語音。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。

「魔王軍團肉便器」由著名日本製作室 Norn/Miel所創作,並由cherry kiss櫻桃社正式漢化, 把日本遊戲帶到全世界。

**請注意 ***
本遊戲中所有描述和視覺表現的人物都已超過18歲，在本遊戲的製作過程中沒有使用實際的、也無法識別的未成年人。

data.short_description: 打開就社保!廢柴男主掉進了女勇者和女魔王抗爭的異世界。卻因異於常人的大雕能力，把全部人馴化成自己的玩物！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS 10.11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

data.name: Stealing a Monster Girl Harem
data.detailed_description:
In a boring country town, Kozo's daily life is changed forever by a terrifying attack by a marauding army of Monster Girl warriors. While trying to escape the sexy and scary Mea, Kozo avoids Mea's magical explosions and the cave system collapses, sending him deep into its uncharted depths.

As luck would have it, this newly revealed area of the cave contains the magical treasure of a legendary thief, The Silver Rat, through which our hero is bestowed the skills of the Master Thief! After turning the tables on Mea and successfully seducing her with his own brand of sexy skills, he sets out on his own quest to steal the loyalty and virginity of the entire Monster Girl army and claim his very own Monster Girl harem!

Dark elves, Onis, Wolf girls, a dragon and more! With the powers of The Silver Rat on your side, all the sexiest monster girls are yours for the fucking!


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • All Girls are fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • Plenty of sexy fun as you steal your way to Monster Girl Harem master!

Stealing a Monster Girl Harem Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.

data.short_description: Taken hostage by a marauding army of Monster Girl warriors, Kozo discovers a magical treasure and is bestowed with the master skills of thievery. Follow Kozo's quest to steal the loyalty and virginity of the entire Monster Girl army and claim his very own harem.
